Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4439 "JBIRD-4439" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "J-Bird.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Changed the LDA #$02 instruction at $59EA to be RTS, NOP instead to remove highscore saving to disk.
